user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my actual expenses in a list with added on date, title, expenses, amount and status, so that I can track my submitted expenses
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Expenses screen; When the page loads; Then my expenses are listed with Added on, Title, Expenses, Amount (₹), Status and Task columns

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my expenses by a From and To period, so that I can review expenses within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Expenses screen; When I set a From and To date and click Search; Then only expenses within that period are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my expenses by status including settlement and acknowledgement states, so that I can track expenses through the full settlement lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Expenses screen; When I select a status such as "Settled and Closed" or "Settlement Pending from Employee" and click Search; Then only expenses with that status are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my expenses by amount, so that I can locate expenses of a particular value
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Expenses screen; When I enter an Amount (₹) filter and click Search; Then only expenses matching that amount are displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset my filters, so that I can clear selections and view all expenses again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period, status or amount filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters are cleared and the full list is restored

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the expenses list, so that I can see the latest settlement status of my expenses
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Expenses screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list is reloaded with current data
